questions.question: What is the difference between abstraction and encapsulation?
keyPoints: Abstraction focuses on hiding implementation details
Encapsulation focuses on bundling data and methods

questions.question: What is data hiding in OOP?
keyPoints: Hiding internal details of an object

questions.question: What is the purpose of access specifiers in C++?
Explain the concept of abstraction in OOP with an example.
keyPoints: Example: A car with a complex engine

questions.question: Explain the concept of encapsulation in OOP with an example.
keyPoints: Example: A pill box with medicine and instructions

questions.question: Compare and contrast abstraction and encapsulation in OOP.
keyPoints: Abstraction focuses on hiding implementation details
Encapsulation focuses on bundling data and methods
Both are used to achieve data hiding
